title: Chat Vars
description: Simple client mod to add variables to your chat
body:
_You tired of writing poems to chat just to send your coordinates?_
_You need to write fast message to your friend?_
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LN5yJbmW/images/d54a5059e8a33990ef71ab072934a82161ab6eab.gif)

With this mod you can:

1. Shortify your messages using **configurable variables**
2. _More coming soon..._

How it works:

[User] My pos is <XYZ> -> [MOD] My pos is ```getPos()``` -> [ON SERVER] Player: My pos is 103 42 -1034

This is my first fabric mode, so i ready to constructive critic!
